summary.allowed_use: sidewall solver/wet/route branch execution packet;authorized branch preparation;candidate/context evidence inventory;next execution prioritization
summary.blocked_use: final solver claim;formal q_ch weighting;route_score;winner;JRC;yield;detection_probability;wet_pass_probability;clogging_rate;time_to_clog;recovery;COMSOL launch without branch packet;.mph load without branch packet;fabrication release;production ingestion

branch_rows.branch_name: COMSOL clean mirror receipt and launch precondition
branch_rows.next_execution_step: publish source-hashed clean COMSOL mirror receipt before any launch
branch_rows.next_required_evidence: COMSOL clean mirror receipt with source path, git head, artifact hashes, and explicit launch/no-launch state

branch_rows.next_execution_step: expand pressure-flow evidence with validation grid or COMSOL/solver comparison packet before q_ch weighting
branch_rows.next_required_evidence: validated pressure-flow grid, solver tolerance, source hash, and formal q_ch binding contract

branch_rows.next_execution_step: define trapezoid cut-cell/FEM grid, zeta metadata, ionic strength, Debye length, and blocked-bin policy
branch_rows.next_required_evidence: profile-aware electrokinetic grid, zeta/ionic-strength metadata, rectangle-limit test, and theta-mutation evidence

branch_rows.branch_name: Optical reference, true W_eff, and detector response branch
branch_rows.next_execution_step: bind blank-channel calibration or optical solver output to detector operator before true W_eff or detection probability
branch_rows.next_required_evidence: measured blank-channel amplitude/phase table or optical solver output, detector operator, ROI/slit throughput, and transfer validation

branch_rows.branch_name: Wet EV, detection context, and passability evidence branch
branch_rows.next_execution_step: ingest sidewall-specific wet observations and detector/blank transfer evidence with controls, uncertainty, and hashes
branch_rows.next_required_evidence: accepted wet observation bundle, sidewall detector/blank transfer, replicates, controls, uncertainty, and preregistration

branch_rows.branch_name: Integrated route, yield, and detection decision branch
branch_rows.next_execution_step: wait for flow/q_ch, optical/detection, and wet observation evidence packets; then bind route score and yield/detection formula text
branch_rows.next_required_evidence: all blocker lanes resolved plus route score, winner, yield, and detection formula/hash contract

claim_guard_rows.required_evidence_before_true: validated pressure-flow grid and q_ch binding sidecar
solver output, pressure boundary, route normalization, and q_ch sidecar
profile-aware grid, zeta, ionic strength, Debye length, and mutation tests
optical solver or measured blank-channel calibration plus detector operator
detector/blank transfer, threshold model, standard particles, and uncertainty
sidewall-specific wet observations, controls, replicates, and uncertainty
all branch packets plus route-score formula, JRC policy, and source hashes
route decision, wet validation, fabrication tolerances, and release ledger
